props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the base component.

props.name: fluid
props.description: Set container 100% wide, spanning the entire width of the viewport.

props.name: lg
props.description: Set container 100% wide until large breakpoint.

props.name: md
props.description: Set container 100% wide until medium breakpoint.

props.name: sm
props.description: Set container 100% wide until small breakpoint.

props.name: xl
props.description: Set container 100% wide until X-large breakpoint.

props.name: xxl
props.description: Set container 100% wide until XX-large breakpoint.
